Important Changes:
Right now the Next button is bugged
Tried pressing the Next button without rolling, it skipped the dice roll LOL
It always adds a new turn (For example, a game might not have turn 12 logged at all, but you can still reach Turn 12 by spamming the Next button, kind of related to the point above) 
Let’s say you’re on Turn 21/29, then pressing Next will bring you to Turn 30/30 (instead it should bring you to Turn 22/29)
Basically you shouldn’t be able to make any actions unless you’re on the last turn logged (e.g. 30/30, 68/68, etc.)
Pressing the “Log Roll” button always brings you to the very last turn logged instead of the next one
Right now it doesn’t seem like you can make trades with the bank or other players
Cosmetic/Less Important Changes:
Turn order popup: would be nice to have colored settlement images to the left of the player names (also use the word “change” instead of “drag” in description)
In the Game Log, can you add the turn number where each action happened (just like it’s written in the Analytics tab)
The bank is missing the amount of development cards it has
The player tracker doesn’t say each player’s progress on Longest Road and Largest Army (you can probably just copy what the Analytics tab has)

    "new_string": "const pg = {\n  phase: \"setup\",   // setup | board | initial | play\n  mapState: null,   // loaded template (cloned)\n  players: [],      // {id, name, colorKey, resources, devCards, settlementsLeft, citiesLeft, roadsLeft}\n  turnOrder: [],\n  currentTurnIdx: 0,\n  settlements: {},  // cornerKey -> {x,y,z,owner,buildingType (1=set,2=city)}\n  roads: {},        // edgeKey -> {x,y,z,owner,type:1}\n  bank: { 1: 19, 2: 19, 3: 19, 4: 19, 5: 19 },\n  bankDevCards: 25, // 14 knight + 5 VP + 2 RB + 2 YoP + 2 Mono\n  rollHistory: [],\n  eventLog: [],\n  turns: [],        // snapshots taken after each \"Next Turn\"; each = {currentTurnIdx, eventLogLen, snapshotIdx}\n  viewTurn: 0,      // for slider\n  initial: { stepIdx: 0, order: [], expecting: \"settlement\", lastSettlementKey: null, snake: [] },\n  history: [],      // undo stack\n  _mapTemplate: null,\n};\n\nfunction pgIsViewingLatest() {\n  return pg.viewTurn >= pg.turns.length - 1;\n}\n\nfunction pgRolledThisTurn() {\n  const last = pg.turns[pg.turns.length - 1];\n  const startLen = last?.rollLen ?? 0;\n  return pg.rollHistory.length > startLen;\n}\n\nfunction pgLogEvent(ev) {\n  pg.eventLog.push({ ...ev, turn: pg.turns.length });\n}\n\nfunction pgRequireLatestView(label) {\n  if (!pgIsViewingLatest()) {\n    alert(`You're viewing a past turn. Click forward to the latest turn before ${label || \"making changes\"}.`);\n    return false;\n  }\n  return true;\n}"

{
  "type": "tool_use",
  "id": "toolu_01FwwzHBDD7YCipxt4DC51yn",
  "name": "Edit",
  "input": {
    "replace_all": false,
    "file_path": "/home/kai/cmsc471-final/js/script.js",
    "old_string": "// ── DICE ROLL → AUTO RESOURCES\nfunction pgLogRoll(value) {\n  if (pg.phase !== \"play\") { alert(\"Finish initial placement first.\"); return; }\n  pgPushHistory(\"roll\");\n  const activePlayer = pg.players[pg.currentTurnIdx % pg.players.length];\n  pg.rollHistory.push({ value, playerId: activePlayer?.id, playerName: activePlayer?.name });\n  pg.eventLog.push({ type: \"dice\", player: activePlayer?.id, value });\n  if (value !== 7) {\n    // For each settlement/city, add resources of matching hexes\n    for (const [ck, piece] of Object.entries(pg.settlements)) {\n      if (!piece.owner) continue;\n      const player = pg.players.find(p => p.id === piece.owner);\n      if (!player) continue;\n      const hexes = pgHexesTouchingCorner(ck);\n      const gainedByType = {};\n      for (const { hex } of hexes) {\n        if (hex.diceNumber !== value) continue;\n        const resName = PG_RES_TYPE_TO_NAME[hex.type];\n        if (!resName) continue;\n        const yield_ = piece.buildingType === 2 ? 2 : 1;\n        for (let i = 0; i < yield_; i++) {\n          if (pg.bank[hex.type] > 0) {\n            player.resources[resName] += 1;\n            pg.bank[hex.type] -= 1;\n            gainedByType[hex.type] = (gainedByType[hex.type] || 0) + 1;\n          }\n        }\n      }\n      const gainArr = [];\n      for (const [t, c] of Object.entries(gainedByType)) for (let i = 0; i < c; i++) gainArr.push(Number(t));\n      if (gainArr.length) pg.eventLog.push({ type: \"gain\", player: piece.owner, resources: gainArr.sort() });\n    }\n  }\n  pgSnapshotTurn();\n  pgRenderAll();\n}",
    "new_string": "// ── DICE ROLL → AUTO RESOURCES\nfunction pgLogRoll(value) {\n  if (pg.phase !== \"play\") { alert(\"Finish initial placement first.\"); return; }\n  if (!pgRequireLatestView(\"logging a roll\")) return;\n  if (pgRolledThisTurn()) {\n    alert(\"Already rolled this turn. Press Next to end the turn.\");\n    return;\n  }\n  pgPushHistory(\"roll\");\n  const activePlayer = pg.players[pg.currentTurnIdx % pg.players.length];\n  pg.rollHistory.push({ value, playerId: activePlayer?.id, playerName: activePlayer?.name });\n  pgLogEvent({ type: \"dice\", player: activePlayer?.id, value });\n  if (value !== 7) {\n    // For each settlement/city, add resources of matching hexes\n    for (const [ck, piece] of Object.entries(pg.settlements)) {\n      if (!piece.owner) continue;\n      const player = pg.players.find(p => p.id === piece.owner);\n      if (!player) continue;\n      const hexes = pgHexesTouchingCorner(ck);\n      const gainedByType = {};\n      for (const { hex } of hexes) {\n        if (hex.diceNumber !== value) continue;\n        const resName = PG_RES_TYPE_TO_NAME[hex.type];\n        if (!resName) continue;\n        const yield_ = piece.buildingType === 2 ? 2 : 1;\n        for (let i = 0; i < yield_; i++) {\n          if (pg.bank[hex.type] > 0) {\n            player.resources[resName] += 1;\n            pg.bank[hex.type] -= 1;\n            gainedByType[hex.type] = (gainedByType[hex.type] || 0) + 1;\n          }\n        }\n      }\n      const gainArr = [];\n      for (const [t, c] of Object.entries(gainedByType)) for (let i = 0; i < c; i++) gainArr.push(Number(t));\n      if (gainArr.length) pgLogEvent({ type: \"gain\", player: piece.owner, resources: gainArr.sort() });\n    }\n  }\n  pgRenderAll();\n}"
  },
  "caller": {
    "type": "direct"
  }
}
```

    "new_string": "function pgNextTurn() {\n  if (pg.phase !== \"play\") return;\n  // While viewing a past turn, the Next button just scrubs the slider forward.\n  if (!pgIsViewingLatest()) {\n    pg.viewTurn += 1;\n    pgRenderTurnNav();\n    return;\n  }\n  if (!pgRolledThisTurn()) {\n    alert(\"Roll the dice before ending the turn.\");\n    return;\n  }\n  pgPushHistory(\"next-turn\");\n  pg.currentTurnIdx += 1;\n  pgSnapshotTurn();\n  pgRenderAll();\n}"
  },
  "caller": {
    "type": "direct"
  }
}
```

    "old_string": "function pgClickCorner(cornerKey) {\n  if (pg.phase === \"initial\") {\n    pgPushHistory(\"place-settlement\");\n    const activeId = pg.initial.order[pg.initial.stepIdx];\n    const corner = pg.mapState.tileCornerStates[cornerKey];\n    pg.settlements[cornerKey] = { x: corner.x, y: corner.y, z: corner.z, owner: activeId, buildingType: 1 };\n    const player = pg.players.find(p => p.id === activeId);\n    if (player) {\n      player.settlementsLeft = Math.max(0, player.settlementsLeft - 1);\n      player.vp += 1;\n    }\n    pg.initial.lastSettlementKey = cornerKey;\n    pg.initial.expecting = \"road\";\n    pg.eventLog.push({ type: \"placeSettlement\", player: activeId, cornerKey });\n    // Second settlement → grant adjacent hex resources\n    const placedSoFarByPlayer = pg.initial.order.slice(0, pg.initial.stepIdx + 1).filter(id => id === activeId).length;\n    if (placedSoFarByPlayer === 2) {\n      pgGrantStarterResources(activeId, cornerKey);\n    }\n    pgRenderAll();\n    return;\n  }\n  if (pg.phase === \"play\") {\n    // Build settlement at corner (player from selector)\n    const playerId = Number(document.getElementById(\"playerSelector\")?.value) || pg.players[0].id;\n    const player = pg.players.find(p => p.id === playerId);\n    if (!player) return;\n    if (!pgHasResources(player, PG_BUILD_COSTS.settlement)) { alert(\"Not enough resources for a settlement.\"); return; }\n    if (player.settlementsLeft <= 0) { alert(\"No settlements left.\"); return; }\n    pgPushHistory(\"build-settlement\");\n    pgSpendResources(player, PG_BUILD_COSTS.settlement);\n    const corner = pg.mapState.tileCornerStates[cornerKey];\n    pg.settlements[cornerKey] = { x: corner.x, y: corner.y, z: corner.z, owner: playerId, buildingType: 1 };\n    player.settlementsLeft -= 1;\n    player.vp += 1;\n    pg.eventLog.push({ type: \"buildingPurchased\", player: playerId, building: \"settlement\", count: 1 });\n    pgRenderAll();\n  }\n}",

    "old_string": "function pgTryUpgradeCity(cornerKey) {\n  if (pg.phase !== \"play\") return;\n  const piece = pg.settlements[cornerKey];\n  if (!piece || piece.buildingType !== 1) return;\n  const playerId = Number(document.getElementById(\"playerSelector\")?.value) || pg.players[0].id;\n  if (piece.owner !== playerId) return;\n  const player = pg.players.find(p => p.id === playerId);\n  if (!player) return;\n  if (!pgHasResources(player, PG_BUILD_COSTS.city)) { alert(\"Not enough resources for a city.\"); return; }\n  if (player.citiesLeft <= 0) { alert(\"No cities left.\"); return; }\n  if (!confirm(`Upgrade ${player.name}'s settlement to a city?`)) return;\n  pgPushHistory(\"upgrade-city\");\n  pgSpendResources(player, PG_BUILD_COSTS.city);\n  piece.buildingType = 2;\n  player.citiesLeft -= 1;\n  player.settlementsLeft += 1; // returns to supply\n  player.vp += 1; // 2 total for city, was 1 for settlement\n  pg.eventLog.push({ type: \"buildingPurchased\", player: playerId, building: \"city\", count: 1 });\n  pgRenderAll();\n}",
    "new_string": "function pgTryUpgradeCity(cornerKey) {\n  if (pg.phase !== \"play\") return;\n  if (!pgRequireLatestView(\"upgrading a city\")) return;\n  const piece = pg.settlements[cornerKey];\n  if (!piece || piece.buildingType !== 1) return;\n  const playerId = Number(document.getElementById(\"playerSelector\")?.value) || pg.players[0].id;\n  if (piece.owner !== playerId) return;\n  const player = pg.players.find(p => p.id === playerId);\n  if (!player) return;\n  if (!pgHasResources(player, PG_BUILD_COSTS.city)) { alert(\"Not enough resources for a city.\"); return; }\n  if (player.citiesLeft <= 0) { alert(\"No cities left.\"); return; }\n  if (!confirm(`Upgrade ${player.name}'s settlement to a city?`)) return;\n  pgPushHistory(\"upgrade-city\");\n  pgSpendResources(player, PG_BUILD_COSTS.city);\n  piece.buildingType = 2;\n  player.citiesLeft -= 1;\n  player.settlementsLeft += 1; // returns to supply\n  player.vp += 1; // 2 total for city, was 1 for settlement\n  pgLogEvent({ type: \"buildingPurchased\", player: playerId, building: \"city\", count: 1 });\n  pgRenderAll();\n}"
  },
  "caller": {
    "type": "direct"
  }
}

    "replace_all": false,
    "file_path": "/home/kai/cmsc471-final/js/script.js",
    "old_string": "function pgBuyDevCard(playerId) {\n  const player = pg.players.find(p => p.id === playerId);\n  if (!player) return;\n  if (!pgHasResources(player, PG_BUILD_COSTS.devcard)) { alert(\"Not enough resources for a dev card.\"); return; }\n  pgPushHistory(\"buy-devcard\");\n  pgSpendResources(player, PG_BUILD_COSTS.devcard);\n  // Don't reveal which card; user picks via manual adjust if they want\n  pg.eventLog.push({ type: \"devCardBought\", player: playerId, count: 1 });\n  pgRenderAll();\n}",
    "new_string": "function pgBuyDevCard(playerId) {\n  if (!pgRequireLatestView(\"buying a dev card\")) return;\n  const player = pg.players.find(p => p.id === playerId);\n  if (!player) return;\n  if (!pgHasResources(player, PG_BUILD_COSTS.devcard)) { alert(\"Not enough resources for a dev card.\"); return; }\n  if (pg.bankDevCards <= 0) { alert(\"No dev cards left in the bank.\"); return; }\n  pgPushHistory(\"buy-devcard\");\n  pgSpendResources(player, PG_BUILD_COSTS.devcard);\n  pg.bankDevCards -= 1;\n  // Don't reveal which card; user picks via manual adjust if they want\n  pgLogEvent({ type: \"devCardBought\", player: playerId, count: 1 });\n  pgRenderAll();\n}"
  },
  "caller": {
    "type": "direct"
  }
}

    "old_string": "function pgRenderEventLog() {\n  const el = document.getElementById(\"pgEventLog\");\n  if (!el) return;\n  if (!pg.eventLog.length) { el.innerHTML = \"<p style='color:#94a3b8;font-size:12px;'>No events yet</p>\"; return; }\n  const playerIcon = id => `<img src=\"./data/images/player_bg_${PLAYER_COLOR_NAMES[id] || \"white\"}.svg\" width=\"18\" height=\"18\" style=\"vertical-align:middle;margin-right:4px;\">`;\n  const resImgs = arr => (arr || []).map(r => `<img src=\"${RESOURCE_IMAGES[PG_RES_TYPE_TO_NAME[r]]}\" width=\"18\" height=\"24\" style=\"vertical-align:middle;margin:0 1px;\">`).join(\"\");\n  const html = pg.eventLog.slice().reverse().map(log => {\n    let text = \"\";\n    switch (log.type) {\n      case \"dice\": text = `${playerIcon(log.player)} rolled <b>${log.value}</b>`; break;\n      case \"gain\": text = `${playerIcon(log.player)} gained: ${resImgs(log.resources)}`; break;\n      case \"placeSettlement\": text = `${playerIcon(log.player)} placed a settlement`; break;\n      case \"placeRoad\": text = `${playerIcon(log.player)} placed a road`; break;\n      case \"buildingPurchased\": text = `${playerIcon(log.player)} built a <b>${log.building}</b>`; break;\n      case \"devCardBought\": text = `${playerIcon(log.player)} bought a dev card`; break;\n      case \"phaseChange\": text = `<em>${log.note}</em>`; break;\n      default: text = JSON.stringify(log);\n    }\n    return `<div style=\"margin-bottom:4px;font-size:11px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);padding-bottom:3px;\">${text}</div>`;\n  }).join(\"\");\n  el.innerHTML = html;\n}",
    "new_string": "function pgRenderEventLog() {\n  const el = document.getElementById(\"pgEventLog\");\n  if (!el) return;\n  if (!pg.eventLog.length) { el.innerHTML = \"<p style='color:#94a3b8;font-size:12px;'>No events yet</p>\"; return; }\n  const playerIcon = id => `<img src=\"./data/images/player_bg_${PLAYER_COLOR_NAMES[id] || \"white\"}.svg\" width=\"18\" height=\"18\" style=\"vertical-align:middle;margin-right:4px;\">`;\n  const resImgs = arr => (arr || []).map(r => `<img src=\"${RESOURCE_IMAGES[PG_RES_TYPE_TO_NAME[r]]}\" width=\"18\" height=\"24\" style=\"vertical-align:middle;margin:0 1px;\">`).join(\"\");\n  const html = pg.eventLog.slice().reverse().map(log => {\n    let text = \"\";\n    switch (log.type) {\n      case \"dice\": text = `${playerIcon(log.player)} rolled <b>${log.value}</b>`; break;\n      case \"gain\": text = `${playerIcon(log.player)} gained: ${resImgs(log.resources)}`; break;\n      case \"placeSettlement\": text = `${playerIcon(log.player)} placed a settlement`; break;\n      case \"placeRoad\": text = `${playerIcon(log.player)} placed a road`; break;\n      case \"buildingPurchased\": text = `${playerIcon(log.player)} built a <b>${log.building}</b>`; break;\n      case \"devCardBought\": text = `${playerIcon(log.player)} bought a dev card`; break;\n      case \"bankTrade\": text = `${playerIcon(log.player)} traded ${resImgs(log.given)} for ${resImgs(log.received)} with bank`; break;\n      case \"playerTrade\": text = `${playerIcon(log.player)} traded ${resImgs(log.given)} with ${playerIcon(log.partner)} for ${resImgs(log.received)}`; break;\n      case \"knightPlayed\": text = `${playerIcon(log.player)} played a <b>Knight</b>`; break;\n      case \"phaseChange\": text = `<em>${log.note}</em>`; break;\n      default: text = JSON.stringify(log);\n    }\n    const turnLabel = (log.turn !== undefined)\n      ? `<span style=\"color:#ffffff;\"><strong>Turn ${log.turn}:</strong></span> `\n      : \"\";\n    return `<div style=\"margin-bottom:4px;font-size:11px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);padding-bottom:3px;\">${turnLabel}${text}</div>`;\n  }).join(\"\");\n  el.innerHTML = html;\n}"
  },
  "caller": {
    "type": "direct"
  }
}

    "old_string": "function pgRenderPlayers() {\n  const el = document.getElementById(\"pgPlayerTracker\");\n  if (!el) return;\n  if (!pg.players.length) { el.innerHTML = \"<p style='color:#94a3b8;font-size:12px;'>No players yet</p>\"; return; }\n  el.innerHTML = pg.players.map(p => {\n    const colorName = PLAYER_COLOR_NAMES[p.id] || \"white\";\n    const playerIcon = `./data/images/player_bg_${colorName}.svg`;\n    const settlementImage = `./data/images/settlement_${colorName}.svg`;\n    const roadImage = `./data/images/road_${colorName}.svg`;\n    const cityImage = `./data/images/city_${colorName}.svg`;\n    const isActive = pg.phase === \"play\" && pg.players[pg.currentTurnIdx % pg.players.length]?.id === p.id;\n    const settlementsBuilt = 5 - p.settlementsLeft;\n    const citiesBuilt = 4 - p.citiesLeft;\n    const roadsBuilt = 15 - p.roadsLeft;\n    const resHtml = RESOURCE_TYPES.map(t => `<div class=\"resource-item\" style=\"display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;margin-right:8px;\">\n      <img src=\"${RESOURCE_IMAGES[t]}\" alt=\"${t}\" style=\"width:16px;height:16px;\"><span>${p.resources[t] || 0}</span></div>`).join(\"\");\n    const devHtml = DEV_CARD_TYPES.map(t => `<div class=\"resource-item\" style=\"display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;margin-right:8px;\">\n      <img src=\"${DEV_CARD_IMAGES[t]}\" alt=\"${t}\" style=\"width:16px;height:16px;\"><span>${p.devCards[t] || 0}</span></div>`).join(\"\");\n    return `<div class=\"player-card${isActive ? kb]);\n  }\n  return map;\n}\n\nfunction pgLongestRoadByPlayer() {\n  if (!pg.mapState) return {};\n  const endpoints = pgBuildEdgeEndpointsByKey();\n  return computeLongestRoadLengthsByPlayer({ settlements: pg.settlements, roads: pg.roads }, endpoints);\n}\n\nfunction pgRenderPlayers() {\n  const el = document.getElementById(\"pgPlayerTracker\");\n  if (!el) return;\n  if (!pg.players.length) { el.innerHTML = \"<p style='color:#94a3b8;font-size:12px;'>No players yet</p>\"; return; }\n  const longest = pgLongestRoadByPlayer();\n  el.innerHTML = pg.players.map(p => {\n === \"play\" && pg.players[pg.currentTurnIdx % pg.players.length]?.id === p.id;\n    const settlementsBuilt = 5 - p.settlementsLeft;\n    const citiesBuilt = 4 - p.citiesLeft;\n    const roadsBuilt = 15 - p.roadsLeft;\n    const longestRoad = longest[p.id] || 0;\n    const knightsPlayed = p.knightsPlayed || 0;\n    const resHtml = RESOURCE_TYPES.map(t => `<div class=\"resource-item\" style=\"display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;margin-right:8px;\">\n      <img src=\"${RESOURCE_IMAGES[t]}\" alt=\"${t}\" style=\"width:16px;height:16px;\"><span>${p.resources[t] || 0}</span></div>`).join(\"\");\n    const devHtml = DEV_CARD_TYPES.map(t => `<div class=\"resource-item\" style=\"display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;margin-right:8px;\">\n      <img src=\"${DEV_CARD_IMAGES[t]}\" alt=\"${t}\" style=\"width:16px;height:16px;\"><span>${p.devCards[t] || 0}</span></div>`).join(\"\");\n    return `<div class=\"player-card${isActive ? \" active-turn\" : width=\"18\" height=\"18\" style=\"vertical-align:middle;margin-right:4px;\">\n        Knights Played: <b>${knightsPlayed}</b> <img src=\"./data/images/icon_largest_army.svg\" width=\"18\"     </div>\n      <div style=\"font-size:11px;\"><strong>Resources:</strong><br>${resHtml}</div>\n      <div style=\"font-size:11px;margin-top:4px;\"><strong>Dev Cards:</strong><br>${devHtml}</div>\n    </div>`;\n  }).join(\"\");\n  el.querySelectorAll(\"button[data-knight]\").forEach(btn => {\n    btn.onclick = () => {\n      if (!pgRequireLatestView(\"playing a knight\")) return;\n      const id {

  "id": "toolu_018mQBpjCQTEmCYMGwu2yptp",

    "replace_all": false,

    "old_string": "function pgRenderPlayerSelector() {\n  const sel = document.getElementById(\"playerSelector\");\n  if (!sel) return;\n  const prev = sel.value;\n  sel.innerHTML = \"\";\n  pg.players.forEach(p => {\n    const opt = document.createElement(\"option\");\n    opt.value = p.id;\n    opt.textContent = p.name;\n    sel.appendChild(opt);\n  });\n  // Default to active player\n  const ap = pg.players[pg.currentTurnIdx % Math.max(1, pg.players.length)];\n  sel.value = prev || ap?.id || \"\";\n}",
    "new_string": "function pgRenderPlayerSelector() {\n  const sel = document.getElementById(\"playerSelector\");\n  if (!sel) return;\n  const prev = sel.value;\n  sel.innerHTML = \"\";\n  pg.players.forEach(p => {\n    const opt = document.createElement(\"option\");\n    opt.value = p.id;\n    opt.textContent = p.name;\n    sel.appendChild(opt);\n  });\n  // Default to active player\n  const ap = pg.players[pg.currentTurnIdx % Math.max(1, pg.players.length)];\n  sel.value = prev || ap?.id || \"\";\n  // Partner selector for player trades — everyone except the selected player\n  const partnerSel = document.getElementById(\"playerTradePartner\");\n  if (partnerSel) {\n    const prevPartner = partnerSel.value;\n    partnerSel.innerHTML = \"\";\n    const selectedId = Number(sel.value);\n    pg.players.filter(p => p.id !== selectedId).forEach(p => {\n      const opt = document.createElement(\"option\");\n      opt.value = p.id;\n      opt.textContent = p.name;\n      partnerSel.appendChild(opt);\n    });\n    if ([...partnerSel.options].some(o => o.value === prevPartner)) partnerSel.value = prevPartner;\n  }\n}\n\nfunction pgBankTrade() {\n  if (!pgRequireLatestView(\"trading\")) return;\n  if (pg.phase !== \"play\") { alert(\"Trades only available during the main game.\"); return; }\n  const playerId = Number(document.getElementById(\"playerSelector\")?.value);\n  const player = pg.players.find(p => p.id === playerId);\n  if (!player) return;\n  const giveRes = document.getElementById(\"bankTradeGiveRes\")?.value;\n  const getRes = document.getElementById(\"bankTradeGetRes\")?.value;\n  const giveAmt = Number(document.getElementById(\"bankTradeGiveAmt\")?.value || 0);\n  if (!giveRes || !getRes) return;\n  if (!Number.isFinite(giveAmt) || giveAmt < 2) { alert(\"Give amount must be at least 2.\"); return; }\n  if (giveRes === getRes) { alert(\"Pick two different resources.\"); return; }\n  if ((player.resources[giveRes] || 0) < giveAmt) { alert(`${player.name} doesn't have ${giveAmt} ${giveRes}.`); return; }\n  const getType = PG_RES_NAME_TO_TYPE[getRes];\n  if ((pg.bank[getType] || 0) < 1) { alert(\"Bank is out of that resource.\"); return; }\n  pgPushHistory(\"bank-trade\");\n  const giveType = PG_RES_NAME_TO_TYPE[giveRes];\n  player.resources[giveRes] -= giveAmt;\n  pg.bank[giveType] = (pg.bank[giveType] || 0) + giveAmt;\n  player.resources[getRes] += 1;\n  pg.bank[getType] -= 1;\n  pgLogEvent({\n    type: \"bankTrade\",\n    player: playerId,\n    given: Array(giveAmt).fill(giveType),\n    received: [getType],\n  });\n  pgRenderAll();\n}\n\nfunction pgPlayerTrade() {\n  if (!pgRequireLatestView(\"trading\")) return;\n  if (pg.phase !== \"play\") { alert(\"Trades only available during the main game.\"); return; }\n  const playerId = Number(document.getElementById(\"playerSelector\")?.value);\n  const partnerId = Number(document.getElementById(\"playerTradePartner\")?.value);\n  const player = pg.players.find(p => p.id === playerId);\n  const partner = pg.players.find(p => p.id === partnerId);\n  if (!player || !partner) return;\n  if (player.id === partner.id) { alert(\"Pick a different partner.\"); return; }\n  const giveRes = document.getElementById(\"playerTradeGiveRes\")?.value;\n  const getRes = document.getElementById(\"playerTradeGetRes\")?.value;\n  const giveAmt = Number(document.getElementById(\"playerTradeGiveAmt\")?.value || 0);\n  const getAmt = Number(document.getElementById(\"playerTradeGetAmt\")?.value || 0);\n  if (!giveRes || !getRes) return;\n  if (!Number.isFinite(giveAmt) || giveAmt < 1 || !Number.isFinite(getAmt) || getAmt < 1) {\n    alert(\"Give and Get amounts must be at least 1.\");\n    return;\n  }\n  if ((player.resources[giveRes] || 0) < giveAmt) { alert(`${player.name} doesn't have ${giveAmt} ${giveRes}.`); return; }\n  if ((partner.resources[getRes] || 0) < getAmt) { alert(`${partner.name} doesn't have ${getAmt} ${getRes}.`); return; }\n  pgPushHistory(\"player-trade\");\n  player.resources[giveRes] -= giveAmt;\n  partner.resources[giveRes] = (partner.resources[giveRes] || 0) + giveAmt;\n  partner.resources[getRes] -= getAmt;\n  player.resources[getRes] = (player.resources[getRes] || 0) + getAmt;\n  const giveType = PG_RES_NAME_TO_TYPE[giveRes];\n  const getType = PG_RES_NAME_TO_TYPE[getRes];\n  pgLogEvent({\n    type: \"playerTrade\",\n    player: playerId,\n    partner: partnerId,\n    given: Array(giveAmt).fill(giveType),\n    received: Array(getAmt).fill(getType),\n  });\n  pgRenderAll();\n}"
  },
  "caller": {
    "type": "direct"
  }
}

## 🤖 Assistant

All fixes are in. Here's what changed:

### Important
- **Next button** ([js/script.js:4053-4068](js/script.js#L4053-L4068)): Now requires a dice roll first; when viewing a past turn it only advances the slider (e.g. 21/29 → 22/29) instead of forking a new turn.
- **Log Roll** ([js/script.js:3971-4007](js/script.js#L3971-L4007)): No longer creates a snapshot or jumps the view — it just records the roll. Blocked when viewing past turns or if already rolled this turn.
- **Past-turn lockout**: Building, trading, dev card purchase, knight play, and manual adjust all check `pgRequireLatestView` and refuse with an alert when scrubbing history. Phase banner shows a "Viewing past turn" notice.
- **Trades** ([js/script.js:4142-4207](js/script.js#L4142-L4207) + [index.html:162-208](index.html#L162-L208)): New "Trade" panel under the player tracker. Supports bank trades (configurable give amount, e.g. 4/3/2) and player-to-player trades (one resource each side).

### Cosmetic
- **Turn order popup** ([js/script.js:3445-3465](js/script.js#L3445-L3465), [index.html:206](index.html#L206)): Each row shows a colored settlement SVG that updates live when the color dropdown changes; copy now says "change the order" instead of "drag the order".
- **Game Log** ([js/script.js:4225-4256](js/script.js#L4225-L4256)): Each entry is prefixed with `Turn N:`, matching the Analytics tab style. New event types (`bankTrade`, `playerTrade`, `knightPlayed`) render properly.
- **Bank tracker** ([js/script.js:4181-4197](js/script.js#L4181-L4197)): Now shows remaining dev cards (starts at 25, decrements on purchase).
- **Player tracker** ([js/script.js:4214-4267](js/script.js#L4214-L4267)): Added a "Stats" row with computed Longest Road length (uses existing `computeLongestRoadLengthsByPlayer`) and Knights Played, plus a `+ Knight` button to increment.

I wasn't able to interactively click through it in a browser, so please verify the trade panel and the Next/Log Roll flows once on the live server.

---

## 👤 User

Why do the give and get amounts have to be at least 1? Are those the rules in settlers of catan? Are those the rules in colonist.io? Is it possible to have trades where one user simply gives 1 or more resources to another player? Furthermore, when one clicks undo, the user can still click "next" to redo (aka undo the undo).

Furthermore, the trade system is a little disconcertingly difficult to use. It would be better if were made similarly to the colonist.io trade system where an overlay appears for the trade system to occur. But if this requires too large of an overhaul of changes to make, we can skip it.

Also, going back to the undo button, would it be possible to have a redo button next to it as well? Wouldn't it also be nice to have a 'random move' button where a player makes a random move?

Furthermore, instead of having html alerts pop up on the browser, can we have the alerts appear as an html status message either above or below the board?

## 🤖 Assistant

```json
{
  "type": "tool_use",
  "id": "toolu_01PPvBdLvGDBrnqCPXHYZeSW",
  "name": "Edit",
  "input": {
    "replace_all": false,
    "file_path": "/home/kai/cmsc471-final/js/script.js",
    "old_string": "function pgClone(o) { return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(o)); }\n\nfunction pgPushHistory(label) {\n  pg.history.push({\n    label,\n    snap: pgClone({\n      phase: pg.phase,\n      mapState: pg.mapState,\n      players: pg.players,\n      turnOrder: pg.turnOrder,\n      currentTurnIdx: pg.currentTurnIdx,\n      settlements: pg.settlements,\n      roads: pg.roads,\n      bank: pg.bank,\n      bankDevCards: pg.bankDevCards,\n      rollHistory: pg.rollHistory,\n      eventLog: pg.eventLog,\n      turns: pg.turns,\n      viewTurn: pg.viewTurn,\n      initial: pg.initial,\n    }),\n  });\n  if (pg.history.length > 40) pg.history.shift();\n  document.getElementById(\"pgUndoBtn\").disabled = false;\n}\n\nfunction pgUndo() {\n  if (!pg.history.length) return;\n  const last = pg.history.pop();\n  Object.assign(pg, last.snap);\n  if (!pg.history.length) document.getElementById(\"pgUndoBtn\").disabled = true;\n  pgRenderAll();\n}",
    "new_string": "function pgClone(o) { return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(o)); }\n\nfunction pgCaptureSnap() {\n  return pgClone({\n    phase: pg.phase,\n    mapState: pg.mapState,\n    players: pg.players,\n    turnOrder: pg.turnOrder,\n    currentTurnIdx: pg.currentTurnIdx,\n    settlements: pg.settlements,\n    roads: pg.roads,\n    bank: pg.bank,\n    bankDevCards: pg.bankDevCards,\n    rollHistory: pg.rollHistory,\n    eventLog: pg.eventLog,\n    turns: pg.turns,\n    viewTurn: pg.viewTurn,\n    initial: pg.initial,\n  });\n}\n\nfunction pgSyncHistoryButtons() {\n  const undoBtn = document.getElementById(\"pgUndoBtn\");\n  const redoBtn = document.getElementById(\"pgRedoBtn\");\n  if (undoBtn) undoBtn.disabled = !pg.history.length;\n  if (redoBtn) redoBtn.disabled = !pg.redoStack || !pg.redoStack.length;\n}\n\nfunction pgPushHistory(label) {\n  pg.history.push({ label, snap: pgCaptureSnap() });\n  // Any new action invalidates the redo stack.\n  pg.redoStack = [];\n  if (pg.history.length > 40) pg.history.shift();\n  pgSyncHistoryButtons();\n}\n\nfunction pgUndo() {\n  if (!pg.history.length) return;\n  const prev = pg.history.pop();\n  pg.redoStack = pg.redoStack || [];\n  pg.redoStack.push({ label: prev.label, snap: pgCaptureSnap() });\n  Object.assign(pg, prev.snap);\n  pgSyncHistoryButtons();\n  pgRenderAll();\n}\n\nfunction pgRedo() {\n  if (!pg.redoStack || !pg.redoStack.length) return;\n  const next = pg.redoStack.pop();\n  pg.history.push({ label: next.label, snap: pgCaptureSnap() });\n  Object.assign(pg, next.snap);\n  pgSyncHistoryButtons();\n  pgRenderAll();\n}"
  },
  "caller": {
    "type": "direct"
  }
}
```

    "new_string": "  initial: { stepIdx: 0, order: [], expecting: \"settlement\", lastSettlementKey: null, snake: [] },\n  history: [],      // undo stack\n  redoStack: [],    // redo stack\n  _mapTemplate: null,\n};\n\nlet _pgStatusTimer = null;\nfunction pgStatus(msg, type = \"info\") {\n  const el = document.getElementById(\"pgStatus\");\n  if (!el) return;\n  if (!msg) { el.style.display = \"none\"; el.textContent = \"\"; return; }\n  el.className = \"pg-status\" + (type && type !== \"info\" ? \" \" + type : \"\");\n  el.textContent = msg;\n  el.style.display = \"block\";\n  if (_pgStatusTimer) clearTimeout(_pgStatusTimer);\n  _pgStatusTimer = setTimeout(() => {\n    el.style.display = \"none\";\n    el.textContent = \"\";\n  }, 6000);\n}"
  },

    "type": "direct"
  }
}

return; }\n  if (giveRes === getRes) { alert(\"Pick two different resources.\"); return; }\n  if ((player.resources[giveRes] || 0) < giveAmt) { alert(`${player.name} doesn't have ${giveAmt} ${giveRes}.`); return; }\n  const getType = PG_RES_NAME_TO_TYPE[getRes];\n  if ((pg.bank[getType] || 0) < 1) { alert(\"Bank is out of that resource.\"); return; }\n  pgPushHistory(\"bank-trade\");\n  const giveType = PG_RES_NAME_TO_TYPE[giveRes];\n  player.resources[giveRes] -= giveAmt;\n  pg.bank[giveType] = (pg.bank[giveType] || 0) + giveAmt;\n  player.resources[getRes] += 1;\n  pg.bank[getType] -= 1;\n  pgLogEvent({\n    type: \"bankTrade\",\n    player: playerId,\n    given: Array(giveAmt).fill(giveType),\n    received: [getType],\n  });\n  pgRenderAll();\n}\n\nfunction pgPlayerTrade() {\n  if (!pgRequireLatestView(\"trading\")) return;\n  if (pg.phase !== \"play\") { alert(\"Trades only available during the main game.\"); return; }\n  const playerId = Number(document.getElementById(\"playerSelector\")?.value);\n  const partnerId = Number(document.getElementById(\"playerTradePartner\")?.value);\n  const player = pg.players.find(p => p.id === playerId);\n  const partner = pg.players.find(p => p.id === partnerId);\n  if (!player || !partner) return;\n  if (player.id === partner.id) { alert(\"Pick a different partner.\"); return; }\n  const giveRes = document.getElementById(\"playerTradeGiveRes\")?.value;\n  const getRes = document.getElementById(\"playerTradeGetRes\")?.value;\n  const giveAmt = Number(document.getElementById(\"playerTradeGiveAmt\")?.value || 0);\n  const getAmt = Number(document.getElementById(\"playerTradeGetAmt\")?.value || 0);\n  if (!giveRes || !getRes) return;\n  if (!Number.isFinite(giveAmt) || giveAmt < 1 || !Number.isFinite(getAmt) || getAmt < 1) {\n    alert(\"Give and Get amounts must be at least 1.\");\n    return;\n  }\n  if ((player.resources[giveRes] || 0) < giveAmt) { alert(`${player.name} doesn't have ${giveAmt} ${giveRes}.`); return; }\n  if ((partner.resources[getRes] || 0) < getAmt) { alert(`${partner.name} doesn't have ${getAmt} ${getRes}.`); return; }\n  pgPushHistory(\"player-trade\");\n  player.resources[giveRes] -= giveAmt;\n  partner.resources[giveRes] = (partner.resources[giveRes] || 0) + giveAmt;\n  partner.resources[getRes] -= getAmt;\n  player.resources[getRes] = (player.resources[getRes] || 0) + getAmt;\n  const giveType = PG_RES_NAME_TO_TYPE[giveRes];\n  const getType = PG_RES_NAME_TO_TYPE[getRes];\n  pgLogEvent({\n    type: \"playerTrade\",\n    player: playerId,\n    partner: partnerId,\n    given: Array(giveAmt).fill(giveType),\n    received: Array(getAmt).fill(getType),\n  });\n  pgRenderAll();\n}",
    "new_string": "function pgBankTrade() {\n  if (!pgRequireLatestView(\"trading\")) return;\n  if (pg.phase !== \"play\") { pgStatus(\"Trades only available during the main game.\", \"warn\"); return; }\n  const playerId = Number(document.getElementById(\"playerSelector\")?.value);\n  const player = pg.players.find(p => p.id === playerId);\n  if (!player) return;\n  const giveRes = document.getElementById(\"bankTradeGiveRes\")?.value;\n  const getRes = document.getElementById(\"bankTradeGetRes\")?.value;\n  const giveAmt = Number(document.getElementById(\"bankTradeGiveAmt\")?.value || 0);\n  const getAmt = Number(document.getElementById(\"bankTradeGetAmt\")?.value || 0);\n  if (!giveRes || !getRes) return;\n  if (!Number.isFinite(giveAmt) || giveAmt < 0 || !Number.isFinite(getAmt) || getAmt < 0) {\n    pgStatus(\"Give and Get amounts must be non-negative.\", \"warn\");\n    return;\n  }\n  if (giveAmt === 0 && getAmt === 0) { pgStatus(\"At least one side of the trade must be > 0.\", \"warn\"); return; }\n  if (giveAmt > 0 && getAmt > 0 && giveRes === getRes) { pgStatus(\"Pick two different resources.\", \"warn\"); return; }\n  if ((player.resources[giveRes] || 0) < giveAmt) { pgStatus(`${player.name} doesn't have ${giveAmt} ${giveRes}.`, \"warn\"); return; }\n  const giveType = PG_RES_NAME_TO_TYPE[giveRes];\n  const getType = PG_RES_NAME_TO_TYPE[getRes];\n  if (getAmt > 0 && (pg.bank[getType] || 0) < getAmt) { pgStatus(\"Bank doesn't have that many to give out.\", \"warn\"); return; }\n  pgPushHistory(\"bank-trade\");\n  if (giveAmt > 0) {\n    player.resources[giveRes] -= giveAmt;\n    pg.bank[giveType] = (pg.bank[giveType] || 0) + giveAmt;\n  }\n  if (getAmt > 0) {\n    player.resources[getRes] = (player.resources[getRes] || 0) + getAmt;\n    pg.bank[getType] -= getAmt;\n  }\n  pgLogEvent({\n    type: \"bankTrade\",\n    player: playerId,\n    given: giveAmt > 0 ? Array(giveAmt).fill(giveType) : [],\n    received: getAmt > 0 ? Array(getAmt).fill(getType) : [],\n  });\n  pgRenderAll();\n  pgStatus(\"Bank trade completed.\", \"success\");\n}\n\nfunction pgPlayerTrade() {\n  if (!pgRequireLatestView(\"trading\")) return;\n  if (pg.phase !== \"play\") { pgStatus(\"Trades only available during the main game.\", \"warn\"); return; }\n  const playerId = Number(document.getElementById(\"playerSelector\")?.value);\n  const partnerId = Number(document.getElementById(\"playerTradePartner\")?.value);\n  const player = pg.players.find(p => p.id === playerId);\n  const partner = pg.players.find(p => p.id === partnerId);\n  if (!player || !partner) return;\n  if (player.id === partner.id) { pgStatus(\"Pick a different partner.\", \"warn\"); return; }\n  const giveRes = document.getElementById(\"playerTradeGiveRes\")?.value;\n  const getRes = document.getElementById(\"playerTradeGetRes\")?.value;\n  const giveAmt = Number(document.getElementById(\"playerTradeGiveAmt\")?.value || 0);\n  const getAmt = Number(document.getElementById(\"playerTradeGetAmt\")?.value || 0);\n  if (!giveRes || !getRes) return;\n  if (!Number.isFinite(giveAmt) || giveAmt < 0 || !Number.isFinite(getAmt) || getAmt < 0) {\n    pgStatus(\"Give and Get amounts must be non-negative.\", \"warn\");\n    return;\n  }\n  if (giveAmt === 0 && getAmt === 0) { pgStatus(\"At least one side of the trade must be > 0 (gifts allowed).\", \"warn\"); return; }\n  if (giveAmt > 0 && (player.resources[giveRes] || 0) < giveAmt) { pgStatus(`${player.name} doesn't have ${giveAmt} ${giveRes}.`, \"warn\"); return; }\n  if (getAmt > 0 && (partner.resources[getRes] || 0) < getAmt) { pgStatus(`${partner.name} doesn't have ${getAmt} ${getRes}.`, \"warn\"); return; }\n  pgPushHistory(\"player-trade\");\n  if (giveAmt > 0) {\n    player.resources[giveRes] -= giveAmt;\n    partner.resources[giveRes] = (partner.resources[giveRes] || 0) + giveAmt;\n  }\n  if (getAmt > 0) {\n    partner.resources[getRes] -= getAmt;\n    player.resources[getRes] = (player.resources[getRes] || 0) + getAmt;\n  }\n  const giveType = PG_RES_NAME_TO_TYPE[giveRes];\n  const getType = PG_RES_NAME_TO_TYPE[getRes];\n  pgLogEvent({\n    type: \"playerTrade\",\n    player: playerId,\n    partner: partnerId,\n    given: giveAmt > 0 ? Array(giveAmt).fill(giveType) : [],\n    received: getAmt > 0 ? Array(getAmt).fill(getType) : [],\n  });\n  pgRenderAll();\n  pgStatus(giveAmt === 0 || getAmt === 0 ? \"Gift completed.\" : \"Player trade completed.\", \"success\");\n}"
  },
  "caller": {
    "type": "direct"
  }
}

## 🤖 Assistant

All done. Summary:

### Trade amounts
**On the rules**: Standard Catan bank trades are *N* → 1 (where *N* is the port ratio: 2, 3, or 4). Player-to-player trades are negotiable but conventionally exchange ≥1 each side. **Colonist.io specifically supports gifting** — a player can send another player resources with nothing in return, which is what you were thinking of.

I relaxed the minimums in [js/script.js:4194-4283](js/script.js#L4194-L4283) and the HTML inputs ([index.html:166,178](index.html#L166)):
- Both sides accept 0 now (the only constraint is that at least one side must be > 0).
- A player trade with 0 on the "Get" side is a **gift**; the status banner says so.
- Different-resource constraint only applies when both sides are > 0 (so giving 4 wood → 0 wood is allowed as a donation).

### Redo button
Added [pgRedo](js/script.js#L3300-L3309) with a `pg.redoStack` that mirrors the undo stack. New action invalidates the redo stack ([pgPushHistory](js/script.js#L3279-L3284)). The Redo button sits next to Undo in the toolbar and is disabled when there's nothing to redo.

### Random Move
[pgRandomMove](js/script.js#L4056-L4138): one action per click. If the active player hasn't rolled, it rolls 2d6 (proper bell distribution). Otherwise it picks uniformly among all currently-legal moves — every valid settlement spot, road edge, upgradeable settlement, dev card buy, or "end turn." Wired to the new `Random Move` button.

### Status banner replaces alerts
[#pgStatus](index.html#L94) above the board, styled in [styles.css:357-381](css/styles.css#L357-L381) with info / warn / error / success variants. The [pgStatus()](js/script.js#L3268-L3280) helper auto-fades after 6 seconds. All 20+ blocking `alert(...)` calls in the playground were replaced. The two retained popups are the setup-modal color-uniqueness check (modal is on top of the status bar) and the destructive Reset Game confirm.

### Skipped (per your note)
The full Colonist-style modal trade overlay — the inline panel still works, just with the relaxed amounts.

## At a Glance

**What's working:** You're treating your Catan project as a full-stack research platform—moving fluidly between heuristic tuning, UI polish, and ML pipeline setup. The 40k-game empirical retune of your AI weights stands out as a rigorous, data-driven approach rather than vibe-based balancing, and you keep momentum high by batching related fixes into focused sessions. **What's hindering you:** On Claude's side, layout and visibility intent gets misread when placement isn't spelled out—the status banner ending up on the left and the Random Move button hiding during setup are the kind of plausible-but-wrong guesses that cost you a correction cycle. On your side, bundling many unrelated tweaks into one turn (player names + axis padding + turn nav + trade UI + dice all at once) makes verification harder, and running hours of edits with zero commits leaves you no checkpoints to bisect regressions against. See _Where Things Go Wrong_.

**Quick wins to try:** Try a Hook that auto-commits or runs a lint/build check after each edit so your UI iterations get checkpointed without you thinking about it. For your heuristic retuning, save that 40k-game analysis flow as a Custom Skill so re-running it next time is one slash command instead of re-explaining the pipeline. See _Features to Try_.

**Ambitious workflows:** As models get stronger, your heuristic tuning can become a fully autonomous overnight loop on your Oracle VM—simulating, mutating weights, and opening a PR only when win-rate gains are statistically significant. Your fragile rules logic (dev cards, Next button) is also a great fit for property-based test generation from the rulebook, where an agent iterates the engine until every rule case passes without your supervision. See _On the Horizon_.
